creator: erichanskrs@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Slawomir Wojciech Wojtczak from comment #1)

Thanks for replying.

Based on
https://www.freebsd.org/portmgr/
https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/

my guess is that a port committer has to "commit" the deprecation and final removal from the ports tree, if that is the action that will taken.

Probably, portmgr (Ports Management Team) will take the lead in the core  decision.

I've taken the liberty in adding portmgr to the CC list.


P.S.
Searching
https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/
I could not find any specific reference for this kind of deprecation request.
